business_rules.name: DispatchOnlyQueuedMessages
business_rules.description: Only ConversationMessages with Status=Queued may be dispatched. Dispatching Created, Sent, Delivered, or Failed messages is forbidden.
business_rules.layer0_source: ConversationService.cs:CreateAndSendConversationMessage:59 (Layer 0 has no Status=Queued concept — implicit: only new messages are dispatched inline). Green-ai: explicit Status=Queued guard before gateway call (INV_CD_01).
business_rules.evidence: green-ai SendConversationReplyHandler.cs:96 — Status set to Queued(1) only for messages that passed transaction; ConversationMessageStatus.cs:12 (Queued=1)

business_rules.name: SmsLogIdSetOnSuccessfulDispatch
business_rules.description: ConversationMessage.SmsLogId MUST be set to the gateway-returned SmsLogId on successful dispatch. SmsLogId=null means message not yet dispatched (or inbound partner reply).
business_rules.layer0_source: ConversationMessage.cs:18 (xmldoc: null = message from recipient). ConversationService.cs:CreateAndSendConversationMessage:77 (smsLogId from SendMessage used as idempotency key before insert). SmsConversationOutboundMessageSender.cs:50 (returns result.SmsLogId.GetValueOrDefault()).

business_rules.name: TenantIsolation_DispatchOwnCustomerMessages
business_rules.description: Dispatch job MUST only process messages belonging to the correct CustomerId. A ConversationMessage from Customer A must never be dispatched in Customer B context.
business_rules.layer0_source: ConversationRepository.cs:GetConversation:121 — SQL includes cpn.CustomerId via JOIN ConversationPhoneNumbers. Layer 0 does NOT enforce this in a background job context (no job isolation concept).
business_rules.transformation_note: Green-ai dispatch SELECT must JOIN ConversationMessages → Conversations → ConversationPhoneNumbers → WHERE CustomerId=@CustomerId. No explicit background job isolation in Layer 0 — transformation_required.

business_rules.name: InsertFirstGuarantee_DispatchReadsExistingRow
business_rules.description: Dispatch MUST read an existing ConversationMessage row (Status=Queued). It MUST NOT INSERT. The INSERT-FIRST guarantee (DD_CM_02) ensures the row exists before any dispatch attempt.
business_rules.layer0_source: green-ai SendConversationReplyHandler.cs:88 (INSERT ConversationMessages Status=Created) + :96 (UPDATE Status=Queued). ConversationRepository.cs:GetConversationMessage:62 (SELECT by Id — read-only).

business_rules.name: FailureMustTransitionFromQueued
business_rules.description: On gateway failure, Status MUST transition Queued→Failed. A permanently Queued message indicates a stuck job — invalid state. On success: Queued→Sent.
business_rules.layer0_source: SmsConversationOutboundMessageSender.cs:47-49 — throws MessageNotSentException(result.ErrorMessage) when result.ErrorMessage != null. ConversationRepository.cs:UpdateConversationMessageStatus:79 (status update by SmsLogId).

business_rules.name: DeliveryStatusLifecycle_DLRMapsToStatus
business_rules.description: DLR (Delivery Receipt) callbacks from gateway MUST update ConversationMessage.Status via SmsStatusCode→ConversationMessageStatus mapping. Layer 0 defines exact mapping: SmsReceived1→Delivered, error codes→Failed, others→Pending.
business_rules.layer0_source: StatusUpdatesEventListener.cs:ConversationStatus:34-50 — full mapping: SmsReceived1→Delivered(1), SmsSendNotReceived2→Pending(0), Unknown136→Pending(0), GatewaySendError6→Failed(2), GatewayUnableToDeliver7→Failed(2), MessageDeleted9→Failed(2), Rejected146→Failed(2), Undeliverable156→Failed(2), default→Pending(0). ConversationRepository.cs:UpdateConversationMessageStatuses:84 — batch SQL UPDATE by SmsLogId.
business_rules.transformation_note: Layer 0 status values: Delivered=1, Failed=2. Green-ai status values: Delivered=3, Failed=4 (ConversationMessageStatus.cs). Mapping must be remapped in green-ai DLR handler. Update by SmsLogId is correct (gateway correlation key).

business_rules.name: RetryPolicy_ForFailedMessages
business_rules.description: UNKNOWN — Layer 0 has no retry for conversation dispatch (fire-and-forget). Green-ai retry count, backoff strategy, dead-letter policy: all undefined.
business_rules.layer0_source: NONE — no retry logic found in sms-service for conversation messages
business_rules.classification: UNKNOWN (missing Layer 0 design) — transformation_required=true. NOT a gate failure.
